version_description: This version is different than the original song because in the song he picks the guitar and these are just the simple chords.

versions.version_description: I wrote the tab to be played with the guitar tuned the way Morgan plays in which is half step down.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This tab was made for Piano but it'll work for guitar



[Intro]
[ch]D#m[/ch]  [ch]C#[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch] (x2)

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#[/ch]
   Don't know where you're at[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]B[/ch]
   Don't know where you been[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
   Don't know nothin' bout that boy you're into[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                      [ch]C#[/ch]
   Don't feel bad for you[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]B[/ch]
   But I feel bad for him[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]
   And all the hell you're gonna be puttin him through[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                          [ch]C#[/ch]
   Probably tell him we're a burnt out flame[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]
   Probably tell him that I ain't been on your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                          [ch]C#[/ch]
   How I ain't nothin' but a long gone thing[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]
   You can curse my name[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]G#m[/ch]
   But baby don't you lie[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                             [ch]C#[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin' are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're ridin' where he's drivin' are you missin' my street?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]C#[/ch]
   And every time you close your eyes tell me who do you see?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin's are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#[/ch]
   Come on over tonight[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
   Wish that truck in your drive was mine just like you know it's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#[/ch]
   When you're up in his bed, am I up in your head?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                            [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   Makin' you crazy, tell me baby are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]C#[/ch]
   Are you thinkin' bout[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]B[/ch]
   Are you thinkin' bout[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin' are you thinkin's bout me?[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                         [ch]C#[/ch]
   Do you hide your phone?[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]B[/ch]
   Did you change my name?[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]   [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When he wants to go to our go to place[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#[/ch]
   Do you tell him you can't?[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]B[/ch]
   Then go out of your way to be somewhere[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]          [ch]D#m[/ch]
   Any damn where that I am[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                             [ch]C#[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin' are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're ridin' where he's drivin' are you missin' my street?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]C#[/ch]
   And every time you close your eyes tell me who do you see?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin's are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#[/ch]
   Come on over tonight[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
   Wish that truck in your drive was mine just like you know it's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#[/ch]
   When you're up in his bed, am I up in your head?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                            [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   Makin' you crazy, tell me baby are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                      [ch]C#[/ch]
   Are you thinkin' bout[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]B[/ch]
   Are you thinkin' bout[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin' are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]

[Bridge]                             C#
   Don't know where you're at
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]G#m[/ch]
   Girl I know where you oughta be[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                             [ch]C#[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin' are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're ridin' where he's drivin' are you missin' my street?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]C#[/ch]
   And every time you close your eyes tell me who do you see?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   When you're tastin what he's drinkin's are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#[/ch]
   Come on over tonight[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
   Wish that truck in your drive was mine just like you know it's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#[/ch]
   When you're up in his bed, am I up in your head?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                            [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   Makin' you crazy, tell me baby are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab] [ch]C#[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]
   Yeah are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]           [ch]D#m[/ch]
   Are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
